title: Disable Metric Alias Add Button Until Value Entered
story: As a DataTools Pro user adding metric aliases, I want the add button disabled until I enter a value, so that I cannot accidentally create blank alias entries.
description: Prevent null/empty metric alias entries by disabling the add button until a value is entered in the input field. Server-side validation also prevents empty values even if the client-side disable is bypassed.
acceptance_criteria: Add button is disabled when the alias input field is empty
Add button enables when a value is entered
Server-side validation rejects empty values as a fallback
Existing alias add functionality works normally with valid values
ux_changes: Metric alias add button disabled until a value is entered, preventing blank entries.
middleware_changes: Server-side validation prevents empty alias values as defense in depth.
implementation_notes: Fixed as part of the MBT-320 batch. Both client-side (disabled button) and server-side (validation) protections added.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed this was already fixed in the MBT-320 work with both client and server-side protections.
